query: I have a 2x2 contingency table: 3 successes / 7 failures vs 8 successes / 12 failures. Chi-squared or Fisher?
expected_behavior: Recommends Fisher's exact test (and does NOT recommend the chi-squared test)
Names the rule that drives the choice: minimum expected cell count must be at least 5 for chi-squared; if any cell is below 5, use Fisher
Computes or estimates the expected counts to justify the recommendation (e.g., computes expected count for at least one cell and shows it falls below 5)
